content: TP-182 remains genuinely blocked in Step 1 by an incomplete lane checkout. I re-verified the execution worktree, local refs, and remote refs available in this lane: repo root contains only `.pi/`, `docs/`, `hello-taskplane*.md`, and `taskplane-tasks/`; `dashboard/`, `extensions/`, `package.json`, and `extensions/tests/loader.mjs` are absent; `git sparse-checkout list` is empty; local `main`/reachable history lack the prompt-target files; and `git ls-tree --name-only origin/main` also shows only `.gitignore`, `.pi/`, and `taskplane-tasks/`. I updated STATUS.md with these commands/results, but I cannot implement Step 1+ without a restaged checkout or branch containing the Taskplane sources referenced by the prompt.
